header.title: Custom software and SaaS-style products for real operations
header.subtitle: We operate products in production ourselves—not only client projects—so we understand uptime, permissions, billing, and admin workflows end to end.

items.title: SaaS & customer-facing products
items.text: Subscription apps, customer portals, and multi-tenant experiences with auth, roles, and the admin tools your team needs.

items.title: Business platforms
items.text: Internal and external platforms shaped around how your teams actually work—workflows, approvals, and role-based access.

items.title: Dashboards & data tools
items.text: Reporting and operational dashboards that make decisions faster: fewer spreadsheets, one reliable view of the business.

items.title: Integrations & automation
items.text: Stable integrations and automation between your tools—less manual entry, fewer errors, and clearer audit trails.
